description_long: This is a small, conical tube of hand cream labeled 'natura tododia', with a predominantly pink and white color scheme. The front of the tube features detailed product information in both Spanish and Portuguese, including the product type, scent (frutas rojas/frutas vermelhas), and volume (50ml). The tube is decorated with abstract, organic shapes and small starburst motifs, giving it a playful and modern appearance. The cap is round, flat, and appears to be made of white plastic, designed to be unscrewed for dispensing the lotion. The body of the tube is likely made of a flexible plastic or laminate, allowing it to be squeezed to dispense the contents. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or pocket for personal use in urban environments.
description: A compact, pink and white conical tube of hand cream with abstract patterns and a flat, round screw-on cap. The packaging features detailed branding and product information on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'natura tododia' branding, product details, and decorative graphics.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the conical shape and partial abstract patterns, with minimal text visible.
description_view_2: Back view with similar branding and product details as the front, but in a different language.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the conical profile and more of the abstract pink and white design.
